name: Phantom Assassin
description: I'm here to blur the line between life and death. Mortred, the Phantom Assassin.

abilities.name: Blur
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel with an instant cast time upon cast. Grants cooldown advancement to all of her other basic abilities, except Blur, any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill. Reduces Blur's cooldown. Dispel Radius: 625/550/475/400. Move Speed Bonus: 6%/9%/12%/15%. Untargetable Duration: 30. Current Cooldowns Advance on Kill: (0.6). Mana Cost: 45.

abilities.name: Stifling Dagger
abilities.description: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing a portion of Mortred's attack damage as instant attack and applying attack modifiers. Launches additional Stifling Daggers upon cast toward other random enemy units centered around the unit-targeted enemy. Cast Range: 700/850/1000/1150. Number of Targets: 1 (3). Instant Attack Factor: 0.3/0.45/0.6/0.75 (0.45/0.6/0.75/0.9). Attack Damage Bonus: 65/70/75/80. Move Speed Slow: 50%. Slow Duration: 2.1/2.4/2.7/3. Mana Cost: 6.

abilities.name: Phantom Strike
abilities.description: Teleports next to the targeted unit upon cast. Grants bonus attack speed while attacking if the targeted unit is an enemy. Cast Range: 650/750/850/950 (850/950/1050/1150). Attack Speed Bonus: 100/130/160/190 (160/190/220/250). Duration: 2.5 (3.1). Cooldown: 21/18/15/12. Mana Cost: 2.

abilities.name: Fan of Knives
abilities.description: A sister is generally given a single name, but powerful names often have plentiful allies. Radius: 550. Max Health as Damage: 28%. Break Duration: 3. Mana Cost: 20.

abilities.name: Coup de Grace
abilities.description: Mortred's attacks have a chance to proc the Deadly Focus buff, causing her next attack to be an ensured critical strike. Proc Chance: 17% (27%). Crit Damage: 200%/300%/400%. Buff Duration: 6/8/10. Proc Chance: 34% (44%).
